case_title: CHERIE REGINA GRANT VS. CORA COLEMAN HICKS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRANT, CHERIE REGINA AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, CORA COLEMAN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANT, CHERIE REGINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKS, CORA COLEMAN AN INDIVIDUAL $4,046.39 PRINCIPAL, $11.17 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,282.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
